paper.title: Anchor: Mitigating Artifact Drift in Agent Benchmark Generation

official_release.relationship_to_paper: The pinned commit is dated one day after arXiv v1 submission and the repository README identifies this as the Odoo 19 benchmark used in the Anchor paper. Timing and the README support a close relationship but do not prove byte identity with an unreleased manuscript-time snapshot.

acquisition_scope: The immutable arXiv v1 PDF was downloaded and converted to layout-preserving full text. Beginning, methods/results, and final validity/release sections were inspected to verify coherent extraction through page 12. The official pinned GitHub archive was downloaded and ZIP-tested; its README, generator paths, dataset configuration, 300 task directories, difficulty distribution, and expected instruction/environment/oracle/verifier artifacts were checked. This is source acquisition and extraction, not a deep review, release execution, or validation of the paper's claims.
local_storage_note: The PDF and release ZIP are intentionally ignored local evidence; the extracted paper text, index entry, and this provenance record are versioned. Re-fetch ignored artifacts from the immutable URLs above and verify SHA-256 when absent locally.
